channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: US effort to curb China's and Russia's access to advanced computer chips 'inadequate,' report finds
item.description: The U.S. Commerce Department’s efforts to curb China’s and Russia’s access to American-made advanced computer chips have been “inadequate” and will need more funding to stymie their ability to manufacture advanced weapons.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani And Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Endangered whales found entangled in rope off Massachusetts, and 1 is likely to die
item.description: The federal government says that two endangered whales have been spotted entangled in fishing gear off Massachusetts and that one is likely to die from its injuries.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How AI can help with your last-minute holiday shopping
item.description: If you’re still working on your holiday shopping—or looking for a treat for yourself—you might consider using artificial intelligence tools to help you find the perfect purchase.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: TikTok Ban: Supreme Court to Hear Arguments Over Constitutionality
item.description: Supreme Court agrees to hear arguments on constitutionality of federal law that could ban TikTok in the US if its Chinese parent company doesn't sell it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Salesforce reveals major hiring push to sell AI products
item.description: 2,000 sales representative jobs have come up at Salesforce as it prepares to handle increased demand for its AI tools.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Musk's favorability similar to Trump's: Survey
item.description: American's have a similar view of President-elect Trump and tech billionaire Elon Musk — a key ally as he prepares to return to the White House — when it comes to favorability, according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: Barcelona's subway system is using regenerative braking to help power both its convoys but also recharge electric cars at street level.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Wilson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cisco grabs SnapAttack for threat detection
item.description: Cisco is acquiring threat-detection startup SnapAttack for an undisclosed amount as it continues to expand its security portfolio.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Blood in the iPhones? Apple faces criminal charges
item.description: Apple has been accused of knowingly financing a trade characterized by atrocities in criminal litigation launched by the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). It relates to use of so-called “blood minerals” in its devices.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google pays San Jose advanced benefits as downtown village plan lags
item.description: Google will make an advanced community benefits payment to San Jose that's linked to the tech titan's downtown transit village.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Top 5 use cases for small language models
item.description: Since ChatGPT arrived in late 2022, large language models (LLMs) have continued to raise the bar for what generative AI systems can accomplish.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Making AI popular is a marathon, not a sprint
item.description: AI is everywhere, but from where I sit, there are some strong signals that suggest the road to AI Everywhere is going to be a long-distance endurance race, rather than a sprint.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to factory reset your Android
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to securely back up and factory reset your Android to protect your privacy and data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: CISA cyber leader says agencies have addressed SolarWinds gaps
item.description: CISA has worked with agencies in recent years to expand data captured by the CDM program, improve log retention, and boost network threat hunting operations. The post CISA cyber leader says agencies have addressed SolarWinds gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Global internet traffic surges 17% as post-quantum cryptography adoption grows
item.description: Overall internet traffic continues to grow year after year, with no slowdown in sight. Cloudflare released its annual Cloudflare Radar Year in Review report this week, providing insights into the state of the internet in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Sweden gets one of the EU’s seven AI factories
item.description: The new Swedish AI factory is named Mimer and is one of seven now selected by the EU. Mimer is one of five of these AI factories that will now have a brand new AI-optimized supercomputer.
item.dc:creator: Network World
